briefdescription.para: Provides the register offset for the different type.
Provides the temperature threshold (upper or lower) offset.

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE when fails
XST_SUCCESS when correct params are used.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply.

briefdescription.para: Provides the supply threshold (upper or lower) offset.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply.
Type of the direction - falling or rising.
Numerator for conversion to deg C.
Denominator for conversion to deg C in Q8.7 format.

memberdef.argsstring: (int Val, int Val2, u32 RegVal, u32 *RawData)
memberdef.name: XSysMonPsv_SupplyProcessedToRaw

briefdescription.para: Checks if the supply value has exceeded the set threshold values.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply.

simplesect.para: True if new data available. False if new data is not available. Invalid if the Supply has not been configured.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the alarm was cleared. XSYSMONPSV_INVALID if the Supply has not been configured.

briefdescription.para: Enables the specified interrupts in the device.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be enabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XSYSMON_IER_* bits defined in InstancePtr.h.
Interrupt enable register to be used

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE if error
XST_SUCCESS if successful

briefdescription.para: Disables the specified interrupts in the device.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be disabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XSYSMONPSV_IDR_* bits defined in InstancePtr.h.
Interrupt disable register to be used

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE if error
XST_SUCCESS if successful

briefdescription.para: Returns the interrupt status read from Interrupt Status Register(ISR).

detaileddescription.para: Use the XSYSMONPSV_ISR* constants defined in InstancePtr.h to interpret the returned value.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit value representing the contents of the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE when NULL Instance is passed
XST_SUCCESS if succeeds

briefdescription.para: Clears the specified interrupts in the Interrupt Status Register(ISR).

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be cleared. Bit positions of 1 will be cleared. Bit positions of 0 will not change the previous interrupt status.*

briefdescription.para: Unlocks the register space of InstancePtr hardware.
